rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible features are provided
Use assign statements only for implementation-level output bindings with existing features or declared variables
Generate boolean range expressions using declared variables with matching types
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid within annex agree blocks
Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible identifiers from the AADL model
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-specific subcomponent ports directly
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq declarations for boolean range checks with proper type alignment
Place implementation-level bindings in component implementation scopes only
Ensure all visible identifiers are properly declared or available in scope
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integer comparisons
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
